channel.title: Asiatische Studien - Études Asiatiques
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Asiatische Studien - Études Asiatiques

item.title: The Emergence of Arabic Scientific Terminology at the Eastern Contact Zone: Calque and Loanword in Early ʿAbbāsid Time (750–800 CE)
item.description: Article by Kathrin Leese-Messing DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/asia-2023-0030

item.title: The ‘Orthodoxisation’ of the Ancient Indian Marriage by Bride Price (śulka). Insights into the Ārṣa and Āsura Forms of Marriage in and out of the Dharmaśāstric Tradition
item.description: Article by Kathrin Leese-Messing DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/asia-2023-0035

item.title: Getrennte Wege der Rezeption: Susanne Hornfecks Roman Ina aus China in Taiwan und Festlandchina
item.description: Article by Kathrin Leese-Messing DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/asia-2023-0007

item.title: Sūrdās’ poetry in the community of Dādūpanth
item.description: Article by Kathrin Leese-Messing DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/asia-2023-0013

item.title: Reinhard, A. Kevin: Lived Islam: Colloquial Religion in a Cosmopolitan Tradition
item.description: Article by Kathrin Leese-Messing DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/asia-2022-0039

item.title: Yoga und Yogi, ein Überblick: Besprechung von Tardan-Masquelier, Ysé, dir.: Yoga: L’encyclopédie
item.description: Article by Kathrin Leese-Messing DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/asia-2024-0025

item.title: Xiong, Victor Cunrui (trans.): A Thorough Exploration in Historiography: Shitong 史通 / Liu Zhiji (661–721)
item.description: Article by Kathrin Leese-Messing DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/asia-2024-0027
